title: The Blue Scarf
content: Every winter, Sophie wore the same blue scarf that her grandmother had knitted years before. One cold morning, a strong wind carried it away. Before she could catch it, a man picked it up and handed it back with a friendly smile. His name was Henry. They walked together to the nearby café, escaping the cold weather. Over hot chocolate, they shared stories about family traditions and favorite winter memories. By the time they left, the blue scarf had become more than a warm accessory. It had brought two strangers together.
